markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new content topics and align on a revised strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Revised Strategy:** Adopt a two-track content strategy to balance top-funnel volume with technical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Track 1 (Test):** Publish 5–10 generic topics to test if they drive traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Track 2 (Maintain):** Continue publishing approved, high-relevance topics (e.g., glossary) to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Performance Benchmark:** The "Two-legged vs. three-legged OAuth" post is the top-performing article, validating the strategy of focusing on deep-dive technical topics that resonate with the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - **Urgent Quality Improvement:** Aembit is at "alert level nine" with growthx.ai. Content quality must improve immediately to reduce review time to \<20 minutes per article and restore trust.
  - [**No New Inputs:** Aembit will not provide more inputs (e.g., interviews, customer calls). growthx.ai must use existing materials to generate high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Quality Concerns

  - [Aembit expressed deep dissatisfaction with growthx.ai's performance, citing:](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Stagnant ROI:** No clear return on the time invested in content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Declining Quality:** A perception that content quality is "going backwards."](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
      - [**Inconsistent Strategy:** Frequent team changes and shifting plans.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Apurva noted that the "Two-legged vs. three-legged OAuth" post is the top-performing article, generating nearly 3x the traffic of the next-best post.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
      - [**Significance:** This validates the strategy of focusing on deep-dive technical topics that directly address the ICP's pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Proposed Solution: Two-Track Strategy

  - [Vivek proposed a new strategy: publish generic, top-funnel topics to increase traffic and reduce review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Aembit agreed to test this approach but required a more structured plan.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [**The Agreement:**](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Track 1 (Test):** Dan will select 5–10 topics from the "New Topics" list.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
          - [**Purpose:** To test if generic content can drive traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
          - [**Measurement:** Establish specific traffic and conversion goals for a 1-month period.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [**Track 2 (Maintain):** Continue publishing approved, high-relevance topics from the existing queue.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
          - [**Purpose:** To build authority in core areas like workload identity.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
          - [**Glossary:** Ashur will continue approving relevant glossary terms and rejecting irrelevant ones.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [Send a sample article from the new topic list to Dan for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [Deliver the 5–10 test articles in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
      - [Use existing Aembit resources (e.g., customer calls) to develop more refined, top-funnel topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
      - [Send an async performance update tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [**Dan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
      - [Select 5–10 topics from the "New Topics" list for the test.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [Review articles in the "Ready to Review" and "Editing Round 1" Airtable views.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [**Ashur:**](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
      - [Continue approving relevant glossary topics and rejecting irrelevant ones.](https://fathom.video/share/ceUNhxcvyRKq-kywXJLNxHLEseKdXFsd?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
